en.extract:
The collared finchbill (Spizixos semitorques) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in China, Taiwan, Japan and Vietnam.
The species favors forested hills at moderate elevations. Primarily a frugivore, the collared finchbill also eats seeds and insects. The birds are typically monogamous, with females building nests in trees in which to lay their eggs.


Diet
They eat fruit, including Hedera nepalensis and Paederia scandens.


Taxonomy and systematics
Alternate names for the collared finchbill include the black-headed finch-bill, Chinese finch-bill, Japanese finch-bill, collared finch-billed bulbul and Swinhoe's finch-billed bulbul.


Subspecies
Two subspecies are recognized:

S. s. semitorques - R. Swinhoe, 1861: Found in central and southern China, northern Vietnam
S. s. cinereicapillus - R. Swinhoe, 1871: Originally described as a separate species. Found in Taiwan and Miyako and Yaeyama Islands of Japan


References

The '''collared finchbill''' ('''''Spizixos semitorques''''') is a species of [[songbird]] in the [[bulbul]] family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in China, Taiwan, Japan and Vietnam.

The species favors forested hills at moderate elevations. Primarily a frugivore, the collared finchbill also eats seeds and insects. The birds are typically monogamous, with females building nests in trees in which to lay their eggs.<ref name ="LPZCollaredFinchBilledBulbul">[https://web.archive.org/web/20120329051926/http://www.lpzoo.org/animals/factsheet/collared-finch-billed-bulbul "Collared Finch-Billed Bulbul Fact Sheet, Lincoln Park Zoo"]</ref>

== Diet ==
They eat fruit, including [[Hedera nepalensis]] and [[Paederia scandens]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Yang |first1=Yifan |last2=Xu |first2=Bin |last3=Yu |first3=Qingqing |last4=Fan |first4=Likun |last5=Guo |first5=Tingting |last6=Fu |first6=Dongshi |last7=Chen |first7=Hao |last8=Yan |first8=Hai |last9=Shao |first9=Feng |last10=Li |first10=Xiaopeng |date=2022-10-12 |title=Distribution Pattern and Factors Influencing Spontaneous Plant Diversity in Different Wetland Habitats |journal=Forests |volume=13 |issue=10 |page=1678 |doi=10.3390/f13101678 |doi-access=free |issn=1999-4907}}</ref>

==Taxonomy and systematics==
Alternate names for the collared finchbill include the '''black-headed finch-bill''', '''Chinese finch-bill''', '''Japanese finch-bill''', '''collared finch-billed bulbul''' and '''Swinhoe's finch-billed bulbul'''.

===Subspecies===
Two [[subspecies]] are recognized:<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/bow/bulbuls/|title=Bulbuls « IOC World Bird List|website=www.worldbirdnames.org|language=en-US|access-date=2017-03-12}}</ref>
* ''S. s. semitorques'' - <small>[[Robert Swinhoe|R. Swinhoe]], 1861</small>: Found in central and southern China, northern Vietnam
* ''S. s. cinereicapillus'' - <small>R. Swinhoe, 1871</small>: Originally described as a separate species. Found in Taiwan and Miyako and Yaeyama Islands of Japan

zh.extract:
领雀嘴鹎（学名：Spizixos semitorques）为鹎科雀嘴鹎属的鸟类，又名白环鹦嘴鹎，俗名羊头公、绿鹦嘴鹎、青冠雀。分布于台灣、越南以及中国大陆的甘肃、四川、云南、陕西、东抵河南、长江以南的华南大陆等地，该物种的模式产地在福州北岭。
此物種偏好中等海拔的森林山區。主要以水果為食的白環鸚嘴鵯也會吃種子和昆蟲。這些鳥類通常是一夫一妻制，雌鳥會在樹上築巢產卵。


飲食
牠們吃水果，包括尼泊爾常春藤和雞屎藤。


亚种
领雀嘴鹎台湾亚种（学名：Spizixos semitorques cinereicapillus），是台灣的特有亚种。分布于台灣本島。该物种的模式产地在台湾。
领雀嘴鹎指名亚种（学名：Spizixos semitorques semitorques）。分布于越南以及中国大陆的甘肃、陕西、河南、安徽、湖南、贵州、广西、长江以南的华南大陆、江西、广东、西抵四川、云南等地。该物种的模式产地在福州北岭。
